zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Gill於1474年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏瓦林福德時，她的父親John Gyll44歲，母親Johanna Littlebury de Horne40歲。她於1490年與Sir Thomas Bennett在英國英格蘭爾索加爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1559年在英國英格蘭倫敦享年85歲，埋葬在英國素可霍沙安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Gill于1474年出生在英国英格兰波克夏瓦林福德时，她的父亲John Gyll44岁，母亲Johanna Littlebury de Horne40岁。她于1490年与Sir Thomas Bennett在英国英格兰爾索加爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1559年在英国英格兰倫敦享年85岁，埋葬在英国素可霍沙安。

nameMeanings.name: Gill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Avtar, Amritpal, Darshan, Hardip, Nirmal, Sohan, Ajit, Balwinder, Charan, Jasvir, Kewal, Navdeep.

English and Scottish: in northern England and Scotland sometimes from Middle English Gille, Old Norse Gilli, which is of Irish (Gaelic) origin (see below), and pronounced with a hard g. As a personal name it is not found after c. 1200.

English and Scottish: topographic name from Middle English gille ‘deep glen, ravine’ (Old Norse (Norwegian) gil), pronounced with a hard g. The term is found mainly in northwestern England, where Norwegian Vikings settled.

variants.name: Guill
meanings: English: variant of   Gill  .

variants.name: Gilliam
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Gill(i)am, Gillem, Old French Guillaume, a Parisian form of Will(i)am (see William ).

variants.name: Gills
meanings: English: variant of Gill , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. Alternatively, if pronounced with soft G-, possibly a variant of Giles .

variants.name: Gile
meanings: English (London): variant of   Gill  .

variants.name: Gilson
meanings: English: ‘son of Gill’, from a Middle English pet form of either the female name Gillian (Latin Juliana), or of the male names Gilliam, a variant of William, and Giles. + -son. See Gill .
English: patronymic meaning ‘son of Giles’, from the personal name Giles + -son.
Irish (Down): adopted for Mac Giolla Seanáin, see Gilsenan .

variants.name: Guile
meanings: English (Sussex): altered form of Gyle, probably a variant of Gill .

variants.name: Gillan
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Giolláin, from a diminutive of giolla ‘lad, servant, devotee’. Compare Gill .

variants.name: Gilli
meanings: Swiss German and South German: from a pet form of the personal name   Gill   ‘Giles’.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name Gillio, a vernacular derivative of Aegilius, a later form of Latin Aegidius (see Giles 1).
French (southern): of Italian origin (see 2 above) or a variant of   Gilles  .

variants.name: Gell
meanings: English (northern): from Middle English Gelle, a pet form of the personal name Gerard. Gerard in Middle English was indistinguishable from Gerald, of which Gelle was a syncopated form.

English: occasionally, a variant of Gill , from a pet form of the personal name Jelion or Gillian. These are Middle English versions of Julian, found mainly as a female name, occasionally as a male name.
Manx: variant of Gill , a shortened form of Gaelic Mac Gille, meaning ‘son of the lad (i.e. servant)’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Gill was born in 1474, in Wallingford, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Gyll, was 44 and her mother, Johanna Littlebury de Horne, was 40. She married Sir Thomas Bennett in 1490, in Saughall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1559, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 85, and was buried in Horsham, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Gill est née en 1474, à Wallingford, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Gyll, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Johanna Littlebury de Horne, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Bennett en 1490, à Saughall, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1559, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterrée à Horsham, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Gill 1474 in Wallingford, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Gyll 44 und ihre Mutter Johanna Littlebury de Horne 40. Sie hat 1490 in Saughall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Bennett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1559 im Alter von 85 Jahren in London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Horsham, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Gill è nata il nel 1474 nel Wallingford, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Gyll, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Johanna Littlebury de Horne, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Bennett nel 1490, nel Saughall, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1559, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolta a Horsham, Sussex, England.

ko.Deptford, Surrey, England: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 데프트퍼드 스트 폴
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Gill(이)가 1474년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 월링퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Gyll(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna Littlebury de Horne(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 소그홀에서 Sir Thomas Bennett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1559년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 호르샤에 묻혔다.

pt.Deptford, Surrey, England: Deptford St Paul, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Gill nasceu em 1474, em Wallingford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Gyll, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Littlebury de Horne, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Bennett em 1490, em Saughall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1559, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 85 anos, e foi sepultada em Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.Deptford, Surrey, England: дептфорд ст поул, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Gill родилась в 1474 г. в местности валлингфорд, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Gyll было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Johanna Littlebury de Horne, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Bennett в 1490 г. в местности соолл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1559 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 85 лет и была похоронена в местности хауршам, суссекс, Англия.

es.Deptford, Surrey, England: Deptford St Paul, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Gill nació en 1474, en Wallingford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Gyll, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Johanna Littlebury de Horne, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Bennett en 1490, en Saughall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1559, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultada en Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra.
